---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
A short description of the feature.

**Why?**
The use case — what do you do today instead, and why is it not great?

**Sketch (optional)**
Mockup, ASCII layout, similar UI from another tool — anything that helps
picture it.
